name: totalcapture_subject_v1
rationale: Subject-disjoint split. In the IMU<->motion retrieval task the motion content is half of the label, so any motion shared across train/test inflates results; splitting by subject removes sequence- and take-level leakage in one cut. Frozen before any corpus generation. DO NOT EDIT — create totalcapture_subject_v2.json instead. Hyperparameters may only be tuned on val (S4); test (S5) is reserved for final reported numbers.
